message:
🐛 Fix marketplace grid responsiveness when sidebar is open (#10730)

Fixes #10729

Replaced fixed breakpoint grid columns (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4) with responsive auto-fit layout using CSS Grid minmax. The grid now automatically adjusts column count based on available container width, properly handling the AI Missions sidebar's dynamic width (480-800px) without cramping cards.

Changes:
- Both category view and all-items view grids now use: grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr))
- Cards maintain 280px minimum width and fill available space equally
- Grid responsively adjusts when sidebar opens/closes or resizes

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
